overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character riding a horse with a lantern through a grassy forested area, encountering wildlife, then dismounting to lead the horse around geothermal hot springs with steaming pools and mineral crust formations.

events.description: pronghorn antelope runs across the path from left to right
character dismounts horse and begins leading it on foot

agents.ego_description: riding horse along dirt trail at night, holding lantern to illuminate the path

notable_agents.action: pronghorn antelope running across the trail from left to right

entered.detail: dense pine trees lining the left side of the trail
dense pine trees lining the right side of the trail
dirt and grass path winding through the forest
dark mountain silhouettes on the horizon
steam rising from geothermal vents visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character rides a horse along a grassy forest trail at night, illuminated by a handheld lantern. A pronghorn antelope suddenly crosses the path from the left. Steam from distant geothermal features is visible on the horizon between the pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal hot spring basin with mineral deposits

events.description: moving from grassy trail onto mineral crust surrounding the hot springs
passing by multiple turquoise geothermal pools with steam rising

agents.ego_description: leading the horse by the reins, walking carefully along the edge of the geothermal pools

entered.detail: large hot spring with milky turquoise water and white mineral deposits
white and orange mineral formations covering the ground around the pools
active geothermal vent emitting tall column of steam
fallen dead tree trunk near the pool edge

segments.scene_description: After dismounting, the character leads the horse on foot around the edge of geothermal hot springs. The ground transitions to white mineral crust surrounding the turquoise pools. Steam rises from vents in the distance as they navigate the treacherous terrain, with the lantern casting dramatic shadows on the mineral formations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, forested trail into a surreal landscape of steaming geothermal springs. It begins with the character riding a horse through a grassy forest at night, guided by the glow of a handheld lantern as a pronghorn antelope suddenly darts across the path. As the camera moves forward, distant plumes of steam appear between the pine trees, signaling a shift in the terrain. The scene then transitions to a first-person perspective on foot, leading the horse away from the woods and onto a stark white mineral crust. Finally, the environment opens up into a field of turquoise pools and venting steam, with the lantern casting dramatic shadows across the jagged mineral formations.
